rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative Issue Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Intervenor Marcela Pacaldo's Motion for Terminating Sanctions, or in the Alternative, Issue Sanctions is DENIED. Per the Court's May 12, 2014 Order, all discovery, which includes the instant motion for terminating sanctions, shall be conducted in the civil case, CGC-13-535545. Though Marcela seeks relief that civil court cannot provide, such as granting her will contest and ordering that the estate of Angelina Pacaldo proceed intestate, such relief cannot be granted by way of this motion. The relief Marcela seeks would be more properly addressed in a probate petition, once the civil case has concluded. The moving party shall prepared a proposed order in conformity with the Court's tentative ruling. Any party choosing to contest this tentative ruling must notify the Court and other parties no later than November 18, 2015 at 4:00 p.m.
